title: Loi n° 195/AN/25/9ème L portant création de l'Autorité Nationale de Cybersécurité
issuingOrg: République de Djibouti (Assemblée Nationale / Journal Officiel)
summary: National law establishing Djibouti's National Cybersecurity Authority (ANC). Its Article 3 explicitly lists 'la cryptographie post quantique' (post-quantum cryptography) among the strategic emerging technologies the authority is mandated to address for digital sovereignty and national security.
